name: WearAura
description: La première app sociale qui allie partage de looks et découverte éthique.

rules.accent: Crème de Mode (#F0EAD8) occupies ≤15% of any given screen
rules.backgrounds: No pure #000 or #fff — every black tilts blue-night, every white tilts ivory
rules.typography: Cormorant Garamond for identity, Montserrat for action — never mixed in same component
rules.elevation: Flat by default; shadows only on floating elements (nav, drawers, modals)
rules.interactions: transform: scale(0.97) on all pressable elements — mandatory
rules.animations: Only transform and opacity for continuous animation — never box-shadow, width, height
rules.noGreen: No green accent or eco badge — ethics is in the product, never the discourse
